introSection: Barnstormer is a steel roller coaster at Adventure Island in Southend On Sea, Essex, England, UK. Opened in 2000, it is a Tivoli installation from Zierer with a custom layout.
fullText:
Barnstormer is a steel roller coaster at Adventure Island in Southend On Sea, Essex, England, UK. Opened in 2000, it is a Tivoli installation from Zierer with a custom layout.



Blue track and pink supports.
